commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: I come: Another version has more suitably, "At the great day of God Almighty: behold He cometh as a thief."

commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: Blessed: Blessed are they whose sins are covered, who hide the baseness of a reprehensible life before the eyes of the just at the judgment, by the covering of subsequent good works. In the Gospel also, the Lord, under the example of the thief to be guarded against, commands His servants to watch. <a

commentaries.author: Cyprian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Also in the same place: "Blessed shall they be who shall watch, and shall keep their garments, lest they walk naked, and they see their shame."

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
